title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO IRAYA NORTE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN VICENTE, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, TO SAN JOSE OF THE SAID MUNICIPALITY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2932 / 51 OG No. 7, 3390 (July, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1314, June 16, 1955 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO IRAYA NORTE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN VICENTE, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE, TO SAN JOSE OF THE SAID MUNICIPALITY.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of barrio Iraya Norte in the Municipality of San Vicente, Province of Camarines Norte, is hereby changed to barrio San Jose of the said municipality.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1955.
